instruction: Implement title_case(s): capitalize the first letter of each whitespace-separated word and lowercase the rest. title_case('hello world') == 'Hello World', title_case('the QUICK fox') == 'The Quick Fox'.

files.test_titlecase.py:
from titlecase import title_case


def test_title_case():
    assert title_case("hello world") == "Hello World"
    assert title_case("the QUICK fox") == "The Quick Fox"
